description: Security configuration for SAP Integration Operations

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.AppAccess
scopes.description: Basic access to login to the application

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Administrator scope - full access to all projects and resources

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Read
scopes.description: Read access to view logs, projects, and configurations

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Write
scopes.description: Write access to create and update projects and configurations

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Execute
scopes.description: Execute access to run download, upload, and deploy jobs

role-templates.name: Admin
role-templates.description: Administrator role with full access including delete

role-templates.name: User
role-templates.description: User role with read, write, and execute access (no delete)
